meta.title: Referrals
meta.description: Manage your invite code, referral rewards, and withdrawal requests.

inviteCard.title: Invite Code
inviteCard.description: Set your invite code and share your referral link to invite new users.
inviteCard.noLink: Save an invite code to unlock your invite link
inviteCard.inputPlaceholder: Enter at least 4 letters or numbers
inviteCard.firstSetHint: Your invite code must be at least 4 characters. After the first save, you can change it one more time.
inviteCard.oneChangeRemaining: You have one invite code change remaining.
inviteCard.noChangesRemaining: You have already used your invite code change.

withdraw.title: Withdrawals
withdraw.description: Cash rewards unlock after the review period. Apply here, then contact the administrator.
withdraw.notice: After submitting, please contact the administrator to complete manual payout.

invites.title: Invite Records
invites.description: Users who registered through your invite code.

rewards.title: Reward Records
rewards.description: Track referral credits and first-order cash rewards.
